utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding keys. Now check if each is fully specified per the description:
- health_coverage: Required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan mentions physical and mental health, and includes monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan name provided and monthly/annual costs included. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Required 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan name provided and monthly/annual costs included. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Required 'any enhancement services with costs'. Service specified and monthly/annual costs included. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Both monthly and annual totals provided. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and meet the detail requirements.
